description_long: This is a modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof and a clean, geometric layout. The structure features a mix of white and gray exterior walls, large glass windows, and a combination of hardscaped and landscaped areas, including a small garden with trees and shrubs. The front of the bungalow is defined by a driveway leading to a garage, with a prominent entryway and a paved path. The roof appears to have skylights or solar panels, and the building is surrounded by a low boundary wall. The windows are arranged asymmetrically, with some grouped together and others spaced apart, providing ample natural light. The overall design emphasizes open, functional spaces and a seamless connection between indoor and outdoor living areas.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, large glass windows, and a landscaped garden area. The exterior features white and gray walls, a driveway, and an asymmetrical window arrangement.
description_view_0: Front view showing the driveway, garage, main entrance, and landscaped garden with trees.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the garden, trees, and the asymmetrical arrangement of windows and exterior walls.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the flat roof, additional windows, and the boundary wall along the back.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a clear look at the paved path, more windows, and the continuation of the garden area.
